measurement_conditions.capacitance_volta.note: Bias-dependent capacitance measurement acquired while sweeping DC bias at one or more AC probing frequencies.

measurement_conditions.impedance_spectro.note: Complex impedance measurement acquired across frequency, optionally at fixed or swept DC bias.

measurement_conditions.small_signal_ac_l.note: Assumes the AC perturbation is small enough for linearized impedance or capacitance analysis.

measurement_conditions.bias_dependent_im.note: Impedance or capacitance measured as a function of both frequency and applied DC bias.
